description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown clay tiles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance. A prominent brick chimney rises along one side of the house, suggesting a fireplace inside. The house features several rectangular windows with white trim, symmetrically placed on the visible facades. The main entryway is accessed by a short set of wooden steps leading to a simple wooden door. The foundation appears to be concrete, slightly elevating the structure above ground level.
description: A single-story wooden house with a steep gable roof of clay tiles, brick chimney, and simple rectangular windows and door.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two windows and the brick chimney prominently visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main entryway with wooden steps and door, as well as the roof's tile pattern.
description_view_2: Here, the house's side with a window and the chimney is visible, along with the steps leading to the door.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the chimney and a single window, showing the roof's texture and the house's rear side.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door accessed by short wooden steps, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements.
